verses.text: Adam' ta Seth, Seth' ta Enosh
Enosh' ta Kenan, Kenan' ta Mahalalel, Mahalalel' ta Jared
Jared' ta Enok, Enok' ta Methuselah, Methuselah' ta Lamek
Lamek' ta Noah ahi hi. Noah in tapa thum nei a, tuate pen Shem, Ham, leh Jafeth ahi uh hi.
Jafeth' tapate: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshek, leh Tiras hi a, amau' min ciat pua-in minam tuamtuam a piang hi
Gomer' suante: Ashkenaz mite, Rifath mite, leh Togarmah mite ahi uh hi
Javan' suante: Elishah mite, Tarshish mite, Kittim mite, leh Rodanim mite ahi uh hi
Ham' tapate: Kush, Egypt, Put, leh Kanaan hi a, amau' min ciat pua-in minam a piang hi
Kush' suante: Seba mite, Havilah mite, Sabta mite, Raamah mite, leh Sabteka mite ahi uh hi. Raamah' suante: Sheba mite, leh Dedan mite ahi uh hi
Kush in Nimrod kici tapa khat nei a, leitungah amah a vanglian masa pen ahi hi
Egypt pen Lud mite, Anam mite, Lehab mite, Naftuh mite
Pathrus mite, Kasluh mite (Filistia mite' hong pian'na), leh Kaftor mite' pian'na pupi ahi hi
Kanaan pen a tacil Sidon, leh Heth
leh Jebus mite, Amor mite, Girgash mite
Hiv mite, Arka mite, Sin mite
Arvad mite, Zemari mite, leh Hamath mite' pian'napa ahi hi
Shem' tapate: Elam, Asshur, Arpakshad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether, leh Meshek hi a, amau' min ciat pua-in minam a piang hi
Arpakshad pen Shelah' pa hi a, Shelah pen Eber' pa ahi hi
Eber' sung pan a piang tapa nihte: A khatpa' min Peleg ahi hi (bang hang hiam cih leh ama hunin gam kikhen hi). A sanggampa' min Joktan ahi hi
Joktan pen Almodad mite, Shelef mite, Hazarmaveth mite, Jerah mite
Hadoram mite, Uzal mite, Diklah mite
Ebal mite, Abimael mite, Sheba mite
Ofir mite, Havilah mite, leh Jobab mite' pian'napa ahi hi. Hihte khempeuh, Joktan' suante ahi uh hi.
Shem, Arpakshad, Shelah
Eber, Peleg, Reu
Serug, Nahor, leh Terah hi a
tua ciangin Abraham a kici Abram ahi suk uh hi.
Abraham' tapate: Isaac leh Ishmael ahi uh hi
Amau' khangsimna hih bang ahi hi: Ishmael' tacil Nebaioth ahi hi. Tua ciangin Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam
Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema
Jetur, Nafish, leh Kedemah ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Ishmael' tapate ahi uh hi
Abraham' zineu Keturah' tapate: Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, leh Shuah ahi uh hi. Jokshan' tapate: Sheba leh Dedan ahi uh hi
Midian' tapate: Efah, Efer, Hanok, Abida, leh Eldaah ahi uh hi. Hihte khempeuh pen Keturah' suanlekhakte ahi uh hi.
Abraham pen Isaac' pa ahi hi. Isaac' tapate Esau leh Israel ahi uh hi
Esau' tapate: Elifaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam, leh Korah ahi uh hi
Elifaz' tapate: Teman, Omar, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna, leh Amalek ahi uh hi
Reuel' tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, leh Mizzah ahi uh hi
Seir' tapate: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, leh Dishan ahi uh hi
Lotan' tapate Hori leh Homam hi uh a, Lotan' sanggamnu pen Timna ahi hi
Shobal' tapate: Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shefi, leh Onam ahi uh hi. Zibeon' tapate: Aiah leh Anah ahi uh hi
Anah' tapa Dishon ahi hi. Dishon' tapate: Hamran, Eshban, Ithran, leh Kheran ahi uh hi
Ezer' tapate: Bilhan, Zaavan, leh Jaakan ahi uh hi. Dishan' tapate: Uz leh Aran ahi uh hi
Israel-te tungah kumpi khat peuhpeuh in a uk ma-in Edom gamsungah a uk kumpite: Beor' tapa Bela hi a, ama khuapi min Dinhabah ahi hi
Bela a sih ciangin ama tangin Bozrah khuami Zerah' tapa Jobab in uk hi
Jobab a sih ciangin ama tangin Teman mite' gammi Husham in uk hi
Husham a sih ciangin Moab gamsungah Midian mite a zopa, Bedad' tapa Hadad in ama tangin uk a, ama khuapi min Avith ahi hi
Hadad a sih ciangin ama tangin Masrekah khuami Samlah in uk hi
Samlah a sih ciangin ama tangin Eufratis gun gei-a om Rehoboth khuami Shaul in uk hi
Shaul a sih ciangin ama tangin Akbor' tapa Baalhanan in uk hi
Baalhanan a sih ciangin ama tangin Hadad in uk hi. Ama khuapi min Pai hi a, ama zi' min Mehetabel hi a, Mezahab' tunu hi a, Matred' tanu ahi hi
Tua ciangin Hadad si hi. Edom ukpite: Ukpi Timna, Aliah, Jetheth
Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon
Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar
Magdiel, leh Iram hi uh a, hihte pen Edom ukpite ahi uh hi.
